title: post authsigninwithgoogle success and failure
description: Test the POST /auth/signInWithGoogle endpoint for successful Google OAuth sign-in returning 200 with UserCredential, and failure cases returning 400 with authentication error.

title: post authsignupwithemail success and validation error
description: Test the POST /auth/signUpWithEmail endpoint for successful registration with email and password returning 200 with UserCredential, and failure cases returning 400 with validation error.

title: post authsigninwithemail success and invalid credentials
description: Test the POST /auth/signInWithEmail endpoint for successful login with valid credentials returning 200 with UserCredential and auth token, and failure cases returning 401 for invalid credentials.

title: post authsignout success with valid token
description: Test the POST /auth/signOut endpoint for successful sign out with valid auth token returning 200 void.

title: delete authdeleteuser success and requires recent login
description: Test the DELETE /auth/deleteUser endpoint for successful user account deletion with valid auth token and recent login returning 200 void, and failure cases returning 400 when recent login is required.

title: post authresetpassword success
description: Test the POST /auth/resetPassword endpoint for sending password reset email with valid email returning 200 void.

title: get usersuserid success user not found unauthorized
description: Test the GET /users/{userId} endpoint for successful retrieval of user profile returning 200 UserModel, 404 when user not found, and 401 when auth token is missing.

title: put usersuserid update profile success
description: Test the PUT /users/{userId} endpoint for updating user profile with valid auth token and valid data returning 200 void.

title: get usersfreelancers list with skill filter
description: Test the GET /users/freelancers endpoint for listing freelancers with optional skill filter returning 200 UserModel array.

title: post usersuseridpartner toggle partner relationship
description: Test the POST /users/{userId}/partner endpoint for toggling partner relationship between users with valid auth token returning 200 void.
